title: トリックしてやるのだ！

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text: It's Halloweeeen!

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, everyone better watch out! I got tons and
tons of tricks in store!

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text: Hey, City! Trick or treat!

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text: Get ready, 'cause you're gettin' chomped!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Hishiama warned me about this. Let's see here...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
If you want to chomp on something, chomp on
this.

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, a taiyaki! Just the right sweetness, exactly
how I like it! ♪

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
If I give you a treat, you can't play a trick on me.
Aren't those the rules?

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
Guh?! The only weakness during
Halloween—treats! How'd you know?!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Everyone knows. Anyway, Happy Halloween, I guess?

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
Ugh, I screwed up. I didn't know she'd have a
treat on her...

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
But I'm a super genius! I'll just chomp my next
target before they get the chance to—

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Oh, there ya are, Windy! I got a nice li'l treat, so
open wide! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Shove!

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text: Ngh?! Munch, munch...

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
This thick squishiness... Is this taiyaki? And are
you trying to choke me?!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: It's okay, my treat! Happy Halloween! ♪

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text: This is weird... Now I've had two taiyaki in a row!

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
Graaaah! This time I'll use my quick reflexes to
make sure I don't fail!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Hm? Wait, is that who I think it is?

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text: Chomp!

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text: Taiyaki again?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Eeek, don't scare me like that! I thought you were
going to bite my ear off!

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
Grrrr... Why is everyone giving me taiyaki?! I
won't get to play a single trick at this rate!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Oh! This means Hishiama's divination was right on
the mark!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Windy is on the prowl. Keep a treat in hand
before mischief strikes. That's why she passed out
a taiyaki to everyone.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I had my doubts... But that taiyaki protected me
from harm! Praises be to the great Hishiama!

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
So Hishiama thwarted my plans... Grrr, this always
happens!

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text: But I did get a lot of attention. And the taiyaki were delicious...

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, change of strategy! This time, it's trick or
taiyaki! ♪
